Surname.jp: 慈愛に満ちた王国の王女

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to decrease the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-20%</color> 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的概率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>减少<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,伤害越高。

description.en:
(Passive Effect) Cannot be inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>Petrified</color>.
(Triggered Effect) Prepares the <color=#28d9ed>Revenge</color> effect for every <color=#28d9ed>cooldown cycle</color> of the skill.
Attacks all enemies when <color=#28d9ed>Revenge</color> is activated.
This skill deals damage proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color>, <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color>, <color=#28d9ed>석화</color>의 영향을 받지 않습니다.
(발동 효과) 스킬의 <color=#28d9ed>쿨타임</color>마다 <color=#28d9ed>복수</color> 효과를 준비합니다.
<color=#28d9ed>복수</color> 발동 시 적 전체를 공격합니다.
자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>、<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>、<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>の影響を受けない。
(発動効果)スキルターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【復讐】</color>を発動する。
<color=#28d9ed>【復讐】</color>:敵全体にダメージを与える。
このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh:
(被动效果)不受<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>、<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>、<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>效果的影响。
(触发效果)每当技能处于<color=#28d9ed>冷却时间</color>时,<color=#28d9ed>复仇</color>效果待触发。
<color=#28d9ed>复仇</color>效果生效时,攻击全体敌人。
自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,则伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to steal <color=#28d9ed>all</color> <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> from the target.\nIncreases damage dealt proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>모두</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて</color>奪う。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>所有</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect) After attacking an enemy while <color=#28d9ed>Unforgivable Sinner</color> is active, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>용서받지 못할 죄인</color> 으로 적 공격 후, 대상의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果) <color=#28d9ed>【許しがたき罪人】</color>で攻撃後、対象の行動ゲージを <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: (被动效果)使用<color=#28d9ed>不可饶恕之罪人</color>攻击后,使目标行动值减少<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) When using <color=#28d9ed>Unforgivable Sinner</color>, ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>용서받지 못할 죄인</color>사용 시 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n<color=#28d9ed>【許しがたき罪人】</color>使用時、対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視する。
description.zh: (被动效果)使用<color=#28d9ed>无法饶恕的罪人</color>时,无视目标<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
